title: Magic Vibe Decorations (Crystals, Halloween)
description: Mod adding decorations and crystals with magical aesthetics. Some crystals provide protective effects.
body:
![Magic Vibe Decorations](https://i.imgur.com/nohCXmE.png)
**Mod adding new crystals and decorations with magical aesthetics.** 
Crystals are all inspired by natural minerals and some of them grant **protective abilities.**  
All crystals except crystallised clusters can be converted into **crystal shards**, a key ingredient used to craft new decorations.

You can **interact** with crystal balls, books, baskets, and placed foods. Most crystals are also **placeable on walls or ceilings**.

This mod contains versions for **Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge**.
Fabric API is required for Fabric versions.  
JEI is recommended.

## Guides & Recipes

A detailed guide and crafting recipes are available here:  
**[Magic Vibe Decorations Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cJyGG9espcRKv6pg8AI_Ujt5u1RCCztf/view?usp=sharing)**



### 1.21.4+ Update

You can now use **shears** to obtain new crystal shapes from placed crystals.



### Older Versions (1.21.1 and below)

Grow new crystal shapes using a crystal planter and crystal shards crafted from vanilla resources.

**Note:** Potion collection and magic pot can be crafted with any potions.

*Tip: Enabling glowing particles in your shader settings is highly recommended for full effect.*

---

### Please do not redistribute this mod, re-uploading it to other websites is not permitted.
You may include it in modpacks or videos with proper credit.

---
